string 2: Hey... Look!

We finally found one!
That Digimon is one of our friends!
Omnimon Zwart!
Ungh...
Ngh...!
Tch...!
Gaaagh!
Graaaaagh!
Kyoko!
What are you doing here?!
I'm free to go wherever I please!

We're not father and daughter anymore.
I don't need to explain myself to you!
Urk!
Hrnh!

Omnimon Zwart! What's wrong with you?!
Don't you know who we are?!

Something is different about him...
What could have happened?!
I'm not letting you get away!

You're not to leave this spot under any circumstances.
That's an order, you hear?!
An order? Since when do we take orders from him?!
"What's this...?"

"I suppose you could call it an 
'anti-phase electron lifeform weapon.'"
"We've successfully managed to miniaturize it."
"Impressive."
"You know, it was more than eight years ago now..."

"...when I held in my hands a gadget invented by
a genius far greater than myself."

"It was shaped like a gun, and its owner was
an agent from some unknown country..."

"It was almost entirely incomprehensible at the time, but I
continued to analyze its data, which I had secretly copied."

"I ought to thank that agent.
Or at least I would, if I knew where to find them..."
That black Digimon from earlier is one of your friends, right?

Yes, but something is off... His appearance is slightly
different from the Digimon we know, too.

It's possible that seeing his partner in danger
has caused him to go berserk!
His partner is likely also trapped in one of those bubbles.

Omnimon Zwart always cared about his partner more than
anyone, after all... He is probably beside himself with rage!

The situation is grim. Way too much time has passed.
I only hope that our partners are okay...
We should hurry!
"...Parallelmon?"

"That's right, sir. They're a hostile Digimon we haven't
been able to get much of a handle on so far."

"Dr. Simmons has a theory that they can
travel freely through space-time."

"I see... Then we'll need to take action
as soon as possible."

"'Operation Eliminate Parallelmon,' huh.
It sounds less like a plan and more like a suicide mission."

"I have the weapon you made.
It should at least give me a fighting chance."
"Have you told your family about this plan?"
"No... not yet."

"If I don't make it back alive, I want you to
tell them exactly what happened."
"I'm done with the maintenance."
"I've created a new feature for it, too."

"These 'tranquilizer bullets' aren't for dealing damage to Digimon,
but instead cause them to temporarily cool down."
"What good will that do us...?"
"I'm... an idealist."

"Although the world turned out like this, I believe it's
still possible for humans and Digimon to coexist."

"Digimon show care and consideration for their allies, too.
They see each other as family and love one another."
"How is that any different from us?"
Are they sleeping...?

Wait—don't tell me HE did this...?
Just what on earth is he trying to do...?

Man, it's always like this! He never tells us anything, 
so we just end up waiting anxiously...!
